temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) In a medium shot, Ross and Monica are seated on the couch. Ross, in a navy t-shirt, looks to his right with a concerned expression. Monica, in a white blouse and blue pants, sits beside him, looking forward with a neutral expression. Behind them, Chandler's arm is visible as he leans over the back of the couch. (Storyline: The scene opens on Ross and Monica reacting to something off-screen, establishing a sense of concern and anticipation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Concerned, slightly confused. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:03-00:05) The camera cuts to a medium shot of Phoebe, who is speaking with an animated and slightly panicked expression. She gestures with her hands as she talks, looking off-screen. (Storyline: Phoebe is explaining a situation, likely related to the off-screen character, and her panicked expression suggests the situation is escalating.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Panicked, incredulous. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
